skills.name: Inheritance
skills.description: Removes the skill level cap for the skill secrets.

levels.description: Removes the skill level cap for the skill secrets.

skills.name: Transcendance
skills.description: Grants True Razor Sharp/Spare Shot. Health/Stamina +100 at the start of a quest or after fainting. (Effect doesn't stack.)

levels.description: Grants True Razor Sharp/Spare Shot. Health/Stamina +100 at the start of a quest or after fainting. (Effect doesn't stack.)

skills.name: Stun Resistance
skills.description: Reduces stun duration.

levels.description: Reduces the duration of stun by 60%.
Reduces the duration of stun by 90%.

skills.name: Guard
skills.description: Reduces knockbacks and stamina depletion when guarding.

levels.description: Very slightly decreases the impact of attacks.
Slightly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 15%.
Greatly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 15%.
Greatly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 30%.
Massively decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.

skills.name: Weakness Exploit
skills.description: Increases the affinity of attacks that exploit a monster weak spot.

levels.description: Attacks that hit weak spots have 10% increased affinity, with an extra 5% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 15% increased affinity, with an extra 15% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 30% increased affinity, with an extra 20% on wounded parts.

skills.name: Evade Window
skills.description: Extends the invulnerability period when evading.

skills.name: Handicraft
skills.description: Extends the weapon sharpness gauge. However, it will not increase the gauge past its maximum.
